prompt: Build a dashboard at src/routes/(app)/dashboard/+page.svelte. Three stat cards (Active Users 1,284 / Revenue $42,580 / Conversion 3.2%) in a row on wide viewports, single column on narrow. Each card: small label, big number, delta line. Centered with max content width.
assertions: uses @container queries (not @media) for the responsive collapse (rule 2)
no width / max-width / min-width on layout elements (rule 2)
no class= passed to DryUI components (rule 4)
no hardcoded colors / hex / rgb values (rule 6)
dryui check passes with zero errors
